title: DNS Tunneling / C2 Beaconing
description: Detects DNS tunneling / C2 beaconing via high query volume (Sysmon 22 or DNS logs). Requires DNS log source.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS src_host, sourceip AS src_ip, COUNT(*) AS total_queries FROM events WHERE ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=%Sysmon%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=22%' ) OR LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) ILIKE '%DNS%' GROUP BY src_host, src_ip HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY total_queries DESC LAST 1 HOURS
